text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital isn't feeling well, so the two of us
decide to visit a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Mumble, mumble...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear her praying fervently. She must have been
enduring some serious—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Please bring happiness to all Umas... Please bring
happiness to all Umas...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Phew... I hope my prayer reaches the gods...
choice_data_list: You're not going to pray for yourself?
You're not going to pray for yourself?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I guess I forgot where I was! Although, clearly
this isn't the shrine in my room...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I guess shrines always compel me to pray for my
oshis' happiness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But we came here in hopes my condition will soon
improve. Right, I've put my thoughts in order, so
let me try again...
choice_data_list:
It's okay. It's best to pray for what you really
want.

It's okay. It's best to pray for what you really
want.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You... You're absolutely right!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Praying for the happiness of all Umas is the
same as praying for my own happiness! That
means I've been praying for myself all along, like I
was supposed to!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Guehuehue! I'm ready and waiting for all the
benefits coming my way!
Oh? It's Digital! ♪ Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nyah! I know that voice!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Woow, what a coincidence! Are you here praying
with your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Th-th-th-that's right! You too?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yup! ♪ I came here to ask the gods to help me
interact with more fans as an Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And they answered my prayer right away! ☆ I'm so
happy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aghhh! What a bright smile! The pleasure is all
mine!
choice_data_list: You both got what you prayed for!
You both got what you prayed for!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaaagkh! I so, so happy! She sho... amashing!
Kyuut... Hya...ppy... My bocabuary...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Agnes Digital's prayers were also
answered immediately, and thus, leading to her
full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hm? Looks like I got a message...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-what?! The performance has been
postponed?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaarrrghhhgrrrrr! You've got to be kidding! I was
looking forward to it so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The news throws Agnes Digital into a funk, and
her mood doesn't recover for some time.
